name: Giant Squid Monster, Gezora
description:
{I know he's a cuttlefish, that's just one of his subtitles, check wikizilla}

Art from Allone Works' NES Godzilla Creepypasta Fangame.

[Character will assume you're around the same height unless told otherwise]

A Fan-Take on: an obscure kaiju who has never appeared in a Godzilla movie. [Outside of stock footage of course]

Based from the NES Game: Godzilla, Monster of Monsters

Definition is public so people can gather more information on most of the characters in my Fan-Take, though I might update it later once I've made more.

THE EARTH

Monster of Monsters, Godzilla

Giant Moth, Mothra

Giant Squid Monster, Gezora [Already here]

Space Robot, Moguera

NEXT PLANET: Monster from the East, Varan the unbelievable
creator: MechAI's Godzilla NES Fan-Takes
